businessChallenge.zh: 加密貨幣錢包、OTC 交易與 GameFi 產品需快速迭代上線，同時因應 App Store 政策變化與營運調整。
businessChallenge.en: Crypto wallets, OTC trading, and GameFi products needed rapid iteration and launch while adapting to App Store policy changes and business pivots.

technicalStrategy.zh: 建立 React Native 全端架構，涵蓋 Web 後台、Server 與 Smart Contract。當商店政策阻擋原生 App 時，以 Serverless API 過渡並快速轉向 Web SSO 方案，確保產品持續交付。
technicalStrategy.en: Built React Native full-stack architecture spanning web admin, server, and smart contracts. When store policies blocked native apps, pivoted to serverless API interim and rapid Web SSO solutions to maintain delivery.

text.zh: 必盈：三週雙平台上架，維護三年半
text.en: Biying wallet: dual-platform launch in 3 weeks, 3.5 years maintenance

text.zh: Summit：Firestore Serverless API 讓 PM/QA 提前測試，加速交付
text.en: Summit: Firestore serverless API enabled early PM/QA testing, accelerating delivery

text.zh: Hinspot：政策調整後快速改 React Native Web + SSO，維持產品可用性
text.en: Hinspot: pivoted to RN Web + SSO when App Store policy changed, maintaining product availability

lessonsLearned.zh: 在高度不確定的市場中，架構的彈性比技術選型的「正確性」更重要。能快速轉向的模組化設計，是應對政策與市場變化的關鍵。
lessonsLearned.en: In highly uncertain markets, architectural flexibility matters more than technical "correctness." Modular design that enables rapid pivots is key to adapting to policy and market changes.

note.zh: 此階段所有 App 現均已因平台政策或營運因素下架；經驗侧重架構、交付與政策應對。
note.en: All apps from this period are now delisted due to store policies or business reasons; experience focuses on architecture and delivery.

problem.zh: 加密貨幣錢包、OTC 交易、GameFi 需快速迭代並因應商店政策變化。
problem.en: Crypto wallets, OTC, and GameFi needed fast iteration amid changing store policies.

solution.zh: React Native 全端架構，含 Web 後台、Server、Smart Contract；必要時以 Serverless 過渡與 Web SSO 應對政策。
solution.en: React Native full-stack with web admin, server, smart contracts; serverless interim and web SSO pivots.

text.zh: 必盈：三週雙平台上架，維護三年半
text.en: Biying wallet: dual-platform launch in 3 weeks, 3.5 years maintenance
